heading: Transferred
label: 1272 to 1272g Transferred
notes: CodificationSections 1272 to 1272g of this title were transferred to section 1341 et seq. of Title 22, Foreign Relations and Intercourse, and were subsequently omitted from the Code.Section 1272, , , related to authorization of an executive agreement between the Philippines and the United States, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40160 Stat. 151section 1341 of Title 22Section 1272a, , , related to obligations of the Philippines, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40260 Stat. 152section 1342 of Title 22Section 1272b, , , related to obligations of the United States, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40360 Stat. 153section 1343 of Title 22Section 1272c, , , related to termination of agreement, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40460 Stat. 153section 1344 of Title 22Section 1272d, , , related to effect of termination of agreement, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40560 Stat. 154section 1345 of Title 22Section 1272e, , , related to interpretation of agreement, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40660 Stat. 154section 1346 of Title 22Section 1272f, , , related to termination of authority to make agreement, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40760 Stat. 154section 1347 of Title 22Section 1272g, , , related to effective date of agreement, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title IV, § 40860 Stat. 154section 1348 of Title 22
